title: Chymotrypsin in Stool: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
disorders by itself. Your provider will need to order more tests. These may include the following, which measure different pancreatic enzymes:
Stool elastase 
Lipase blood test 
Amylase blood test 
If you have questions about your results, talk to your provider.
Learn more about laboratory tests, references ranges, and understanding results .
